# WBConnect+
> WBConnect+ is a Salesforce-native managed package that brings WhatsApp Business natively into your CRM — built on Meta's Cloud API with zero middleman markup.

## Product
WBConnect+ by MV Clouds Pvt Ltd enables Salesforce organisations to send and receive WhatsApp Business messages, run broadcast campaigns, build automated WhatsApp flows, manage templates, and store media on AWS S3 — all from within the Salesforce platform. No third-party proxy; direct Meta Cloud API integration.

## Key Features
- **Salesforce-native**: Installs as a managed package. Works inside any Salesforce org.
- **Broadcast Messaging**: Send bulk WhatsApp messages to leads, contacts, and custom lists.
- **Flow Builder**: No-code WhatsApp conversation flow builder inside Salesforce.
- **Template Manager**: Create, submit, and manage WhatsApp Business message templates.
- **Global Chat Window**: Unified inbox for two-way WhatsApp conversations inside Salesforce.
- **AWS S3 Media Storage**: All media (images, PDFs, videos) stored on your own S3 bucket.
- **Full Audit Trail**: Every message logged as a Salesforce record for compliance.
- **Meta Cloud API**: Direct connection — no middleman, no per-message markup.

## Pricing
Starting at USD $29/month per organisation. Free 30-day trial available via Salesforce AppExchange.

- Regional office: Dubai, U.A.E.

## Use-Cases
Real estate, financial services, healthcare, e-commerce, education, logistics, banking, insurance — any Salesforce-driven business that needs WhatsApp as a customer-communication channel.
